examples: "I once thought of calling myself Red-handed Jack," he said diffidently.
"I don't suppose," Tootles said diffidently [bashfully or timidly], "that I could be father."
The country became a full NATO member in 1999 and diffidently joined the European Union in 2004.
Before his trip to Long Island he had promoted it rather diffidently to customers on his milk round.
